name: property managers managing 5–15 properties tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 properties, inefficient asset tracking causes missed maintenance alerts. We provide automated depreciation and alerting instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inability to efficiently manage asset depreciation and maintenance alerts.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inability to efficiently manage asset depreciation and maintenance alerts.
